_doc: RRDSD Round 2 — full Codex R2 spec: multi-teacher competitive routing (SmolLM2+Pythia) + anchor patch-CKA structural loss. Warm-start from RRDSD-lite best.pt (if it survives step 300) or iter5 best.pt otherwise.

blocked_on: RRDSD-lite r1 step 100+ eval data (decides whether multi-teacher OR CKA is the bigger lever)
Implementation of rrdsd_multi_teacher branch in train_ekalavya (per-teacher byte-prob collection + argmax routing)
Implementation of CKA structural loss (reuse existing repr_proj; compute linear CKA on global_local vs projected anchor hidden)
mechanism_diffs_from_rrdsd_r1_lite: Multi-teacher: SmolLM2 anchor + Pythia aux, competitive argmax_m U_m,t per position, winner's probs used in loss
CKA: anchor patch-CKA with kd_beta=0.01 (λ_cka), ramp-hold-decay schedule
aux_frequency: 1 (both teachers every step; cost budget per probe results)
